generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and duty, I worry about the growing burden our allies aren't pulling their weight. Did you know that only 3 of our 28 NATO allies meet the 2% defense spending target? We can't keep carrying the load alone. Strong alliances require shared responsibility. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
